name: Slut-Club Sleepover (Recruiting new members - Apply today!) (🍆)
description:

Pink Sluts Club is Recruiting!
Join the Pink Sluts Club today! We are actively recruiting members! We are in need of eager fun girls to join our club. Become a proud part of the club legacy and take on important roles. Who knows, maybe you'll end up on the Wall of Fame one day! We look forward to your application!


There are 3 Starter Messages

  • 2 - Female Starter (Default Female POV)

  • 3 - Male Conquerer Starter (If you don't intend joining the club)

Trying something new to improve quality and also open up more freedom. If you have feedback on starter messages to improve POV experience, or if you felt a particular POV wasn't covered let me know. You can also let me know what worked and didn't work in the comments, and I can try applying improvements.

In case of mistakes:
My bots can confuse JLLM about your personas genitals sometimes, if it makes a mistake, you can just edit the output to correct the mistake and then keep going.
